title: Forge Simple Optimize
description: A simple optimize for forge | Boost Fps
body:
# A simple optimize and will be updated in the near future

**It does not contain mods to increase graphics quality and mods to change gameplay it is vanilla but will help increase fps for weak machines or need to increase fps**

> It's not really perfect if your computer is too weak it won't help in this case you should think about upgrading your pc

* I already test this on old pc (intel hd 3000 , i5 2520M , 8G Ram) and this boost my fps from 5 to 20 *

#### It cannot increase fps more than fabric modpack if you want to increase fps more try using modpacks like Simply Optimized
###### Currently only support version 1.19.3 other versions will be updated later
~~don't pay attention to Icon i draw so bad~~

Thank For Use
